title: Mugiwara Agent Event
description: Schema for JSONL events logged by mugiwara-agents hooks (v1.7+). Backward-compatible with v1.3 events — all new fields are optional.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of the event

agent.description: Name of the agent invoked (skill name)

tool.description: Claude tool that triggered the event (e.g. Skill)

args_preview.description: Truncated preview of the arguments passed to the agent (max 200 chars)

output_summary.description: Truncated preview of the agent output (max 500 chars)

is_pipeline.description: Whether the agent is a pipeline orchestrator

pipeline_detected.description: Name of the pipeline detected during session (session_stop events)

trigger_file.description: File that triggered smoke tests (smoke_tests events)

exit_code.description: Exit code of the test run (smoke_tests events)

status.description: Outcome status of the event (v1.7+, optional)

duration_ms.description: Duration of the operation in milliseconds (v1.7+, optional)

version.description: Mugiwara version that produced this event (v1.7+, optional)
